content: Did we get compensation in mail?

there's a slight mistranslation in the english which might be causing some confusion. The current text:

> ● This adjustment will make the pricing of special period Premium Topics more reasonable. We will implement the above changes in future versions and will compensate Keepers who directly activated or upgraded Premium Topics within the last 14 days with the difference in Silver Prime within 24 hours after the implementation.

is not quite right. this is the correct version:

> ● This adjustment will make the pricing of special period Premium Topics more reasonable. We will implement the above changes in a future version, and will compensate Keepers who directly activated or upgraded during a 14-day Premium Topic season with the difference in Silver Prime. This compensation will be sent out within 24 hours once the change has been implemented.

basically nothing has changed *yet*, but will be changed in the future. Once they do change it, everyone who has bought or upgraded during a shortened period (like this one) will be compensated within 24 hours
